overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy video game showing a student character in dark robes exploring the interior of a rustic wooden house. The character descends from an upper floor through a stairwell, moves through a ground floor room with antique furniture, and explores a sunlit dining area with traditional wooden decor and plaid rugs.

events.description: character descends stairs and enters ground floor level

agents.ego_description: character walking down wooden stairs from upper landing toward ground floor

entered.detail: wooden balustrade along the stairwell edge
steep wooden staircase descending to lower level
antique wooden dresser on upper landing

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a character descending a narrow wooden stairwell in a rustic house. Natural light filters through a window as the character moves down the stairs, with wooden railings visible in the foreground and antique furniture on the landing.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor room with antique cabinet and fireplace

events.description: character turns left toward the dining area entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through ground floor room toward connecting doorway to dining area

entered.detail: tall white antique cabinet with glass doors
framed portrait painting on plaster wall
closed wooden door with iron handle
small multi-paned window with wooden frame

segments.scene_description: The character enters a ground floor room featuring a white antique cabinet and stone fireplace. Moving forward across wooden floorboards, the character approaches a wooden door before turning toward the dining area, leaving the stairwell behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: dining area with round table and large windows

events.description: character approaches and circles the dining table
character turns toward the large window and exit door

agents.ego_description: exploring the dining area, examining furniture and approaching the window and exit door

entered.detail: same wooden staircase now visible in background against wall
round wooden dining table with white tablecloth
wicker and wooden dining chairs around table
blue and green plaid rug covering floor area
low wooden dresser with drawers against far wall
metal lantern hanging from ceiling beam
tall multi-paned window with bright daylight
wooden exit door with heavy frame

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious dining area with a plaid rug covering the floor. The space features a round dining table with wicker chairs, a wooden sideboard, and a large window letting in natural light. The character explores the room, passing a hanging lantern and approaching an exit door, while the stairwell remains visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, enclosed stairwell into a bright, open-concept living and dining space. It begins with the character descending a rustic wooden staircase, where natural light filters through a window and illuminates antique furniture on the landing. As the character reaches the ground floor, the scene shifts into a room featuring a white antique cabinet and a stone fireplace before the camera moves across wooden floorboards toward a doorway. The space then expands into a spacious dining area characterized by a plaid rug, a round table with wicker chairs, and a large window that floods the room with light. Finally, the camera glides past a hanging lantern and a wooden sideboard toward an exit door, leaving the stairwell visible in the distant background.
